title: Create Squared
description: Discover a brand-new experience with our modpack! Harness your Create mod skills, explore a reimagined world overhauled by Biomes o' Plenty and Terralith, immerse yourself in the wonders of YUNG's Better Structures, and much more!
body:
![Create Squared banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b144e85e7e2d0f4918cd1a93778aae6fbfe0a532.png) ## About Create Squared ### Introduction The perfect Minecraft Vanilla Plus experience! This modpack features the **Create mod** and enhances it by adding numerous add-ons. The world generation is overhauled by **Biomes o' Plenty**, **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **YUNG's Better Structures**, and even incorporates Create contraptions within some of its structures. The modpack also includes a variety of **QoL mods** to improve and elevate your gameplay experience. ### Optimization For optimal performance, the modpack comes with a selection of modern optimization mods such as **Embeddium**, **ModernFix**, and more. ### Features ➔ Modern industry with [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) ➔ Revamped vegetation and agriculture with [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) ➔ Overhauled world generation with [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/datapack/terralith), and [Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) ➔ Plenty of new structures and dungeons, thanks to [YUNG's Better Structures](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods) and others ➔ Unique planets to explore with [Northstar](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-northstar) ➔ Devastating contamination at its finest with [Destroy](https://modrinth.com/mod/destroy) ## FAQ
Shaders Compatibility **Q**: Can I use shaders with the modpack? **A**: Technically yes, but I would advise against it. Shaders aren't natively supported in the modpack, as the Create mod uses its own shader to render entities. However, it disables itself when Iris is actively using shaders. You can still attempt to use shaders with [Oculus](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus), though rendering bugs may occur. If you choose to do so, I would recommend installing the [Iris FLW Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris-flw-compat) mod as well.
##### NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
